instructions: Review Baton as an issue-only Task CLI. Prioritize exact Task contracts, safe explicit mutations, typed GitHub boundaries, and stale orchestration-surface regressions.

rules.rule: Flag config, setup, policy workflows/comments, repository-file mutation, branch/PR/CI/review/merge, delivery, candidate, recommendation, or run behavior in active Baton code and skill guidance.
Every GitHub mutation must have pure dry-run/apply parity, prefix-safe ordering, explicit intent, idempotent no-op behavior, and confirmed partial-failure state.
Task facts must use typed bounded GitHub requests; reject scraping human command output or leaking raw transport errors.
JSON and human text must derive from the canonical Task result; flag alternate formats, field projections, or compatibility envelopes.
